name: Why I am starting Off-Mic
summary: After years on The Asha Show on Rhythm FM 94.7, I am building a space for the Joburg stories that never make it to air.

name: Counting down to 30 September
summary: Off-Mic launches on 30 September 2026. Here is what we are building between now and then, and how you can follow along.

name: Behind the scenes in our Maboneng studio
summary: A look at the small Maboneng room where we are recording the first season, from the mics to the coffee runs.

name: Meet our first three guests
summary: Mandla Sithole, Reverend Grace Moyo and Nandi Dlamini are joining season one to share untold stories of Johannesburg and beyond.

name: The music that shaped my Joburg
summary: From kwaito on the taxi rank to amapiano in Soweto, a playlist and a few notes on the sounds that raised me.

name: Inside the Off-Mic supporter shop
summary: Our presale supporter shop is open with tees and tote bags from R180. Early backers help us fund season one.

name: Home
summary: Off-Mic landing page hero with newsletter signup and the 30 September 2026 launch countdown.

name: Join the newsletter
summary: Newsletter signup section with launch updates, behind-the-scenes notes and early guest reveals.

name: Supporter shop
summary: Presale supporter shop landing section with merch from R180 in ZAR and a thank-you to early backers.

name: About the show
summary: About section introducing Asha Gallegos and Off-Mic, the podcast of untold Joburg and South African stories.

name: Mandla Sithole
summary: Music journalist and longtime chronicler of the Johannesburg scene, joining Off-Mic to talk about the sounds of the city.

name: Reverend Grace Moyo
summary: Community leader from the East Rand whose work with local youth has reshaped her neighbourhood, joining season one.

name: Nandi Dlamini
summary: Soweto-born poet and small business owner whose story of building a bookshop opens Off-Mic season one.

name: Teaser: The bookshop on Vilakazi Street
summary: A first listen ahead of launch as Nandi Dlamini talks about building a bookshop in Soweto. Full episode drops 30 September 2026.

name: Teaser: The records that built Joburg
summary: Music journalist Mandla Sithole walks us through the city in songs in this pre-launch teaser for Off-Mic season one.

name: Teaser: Faith and the East Rand youth
summary: Reverend Grace Moyo on mentoring young people in her community, a sneak peek before Off-Mic launches in September.
